title: Onboarding - Screens in dark mode
scenario: Verify all onboarding screens display correctly in dark mode when the phone is set to dark mode before installing and opening the Lens app.
steps: Set the phone to dark mode in system settings.
Install the Lens app on the device.
Open the Lens app and navigate through all onboarding screens.
For each onboarding screen, verify that all elements, images, and colors match the Figma specification for dark mode.
expected: All onboarding screens display correctly in dark mode, with all elements, images, and colors matching the Figma specification.
